mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ip_investment_pool WHERE is_deleted = 0

SELECT id ,parent_id ,pool_code ,pool_name ,pool_type ,pool_level ,market_codes ,variety_codes ,hs_pool_name ,in_flow_id ,in_flow_key ,in_flow_name ,out_flow_id ,out_flow_key ,out_flow_name ,simple_in_flow_id ,simple_in_flow_key ,simple_in_flow_name ,simple_out_flow_id ,simple_out_flow_key ,simple_out_flow_name ,batch_in_flow_id ,batch_in_flow_key ,batch_in_flow_name ,batch_out_flow_id ,batch_out_flow_key ,batch_out_flow_name ,in_report_restriction ,out_report_restriction ,max_capacity ,lock_flag ,frozen_period_in ,grade_astrict ,industry_code ,industry_exponent ,fund_rate_limit ,open_day_adjust ,outer_sort ,inner_sort ,description ,status ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time FROM ip_investment_pool WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY outer_sort ASC ,parent_id ASC ,inner_sort ASC ,id ASC

WITH RECURSIVE pool_tree AS ( SELECT id ,pool_name ,parent_id ,CAST(pool_name AS CHAR(2000)) AS pool_full_name FROM ip_investment_pool WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND parent_id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT child.id ,child.pool_name ,child.parent_id ,CONCAT(parent.pool_full_name, '/', child.pool_name) AS pool_full_name FROM ip_investment_pool child INNER JOIN pool_tree parent ON parent.id = child.parent_id WHERE child.is_deleted = 0 ) SELECT id ,pool_name ,pool_full_name FROM pool_tree ORDER BY pool_full_name ASC ,id ASC

SELECT id ,parent_id ,pool_code ,pool_name ,pool_type ,pool_level ,market_codes ,variety_codes ,hs_pool_name ,in_flow_id ,in_flow_key ,in_flow_name ,out_flow_id ,out_flow_key ,out_flow_name ,simple_in_flow_id ,simple_in_flow_key ,simple_in_flow_name ,simple_out_flow_id ,simple_out_flow_key ,simple_out_flow_name ,batch_in_flow_id ,batch_in_flow_key ,batch_in_flow_name ,batch_out_flow_id ,batch_out_flow_key ,batch_out_flow_name ,in_report_restriction ,out_report_restriction ,max_capacity ,lock_flag ,frozen_period_in ,grade_astrict ,industry_code ,industry_exponent ,fund_rate_limit ,open_day_adjust ,outer_sort ,inner_sort ,description ,status ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time FROM ip_investment_pool WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id ,parent_id ,pool_code ,pool_name ,pool_type ,pool_level ,status ,is_deleted FROM ip_investment_pool WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND id IN
#{id}
SELECT MAX(inner_sort) FROM ip_investment_pool WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND parent_id = #{parentId}
SELECT MAX(outer_sort) FROM ip_investment_pool WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND parent_id IS NULL

SELECT id ,parent_id ,pool_code ,pool_name ,pool_type ,pool_level ,outer_sort ,inner_sort FROM ip_investment_pool WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY outer_sort ASC ,inner_sort ASC ,id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ip_investment_pool_evt ( id ,parent_id ,pool_code ,pool_name ,pool_type ,pool_level ,market_codes ,variety_codes ,hs_pool_name ,in_flow_id ,in_flow_key ,in_flow_name ,out_flow_id ,out_flow_key ,out_flow_name ,simple_in_flow_id ,simple_in_flow_key ,simple_in_flow_name ,simple_out_flow_id ,simple_out_flow_key ,simple_out_flow_name ,batch_in_flow_id ,batch_in_flow_key ,batch_in_flow_name ,batch_out_flow_id ,batch_out_flow_key ,batch_out_flow_name ,in_report_restriction ,out_report_restriction ,max_capacity ,outer_sort ,inner_sort ,description ,status ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time ,opter_id ,opt_time ,oprt_type ) SELECT id ,parent_id ,pool_code ,pool_name ,pool_type ,pool_level ,market_codes ,variety_codes ,hs_pool_name ,in_flow_id ,in_flow_key ,in_flow_name ,out_flow_id ,out_flow_key ,out_flow_name ,simple_in_flow_id ,simple_in_flow_key ,simple_in_flow_name ,simple_out_flow_id ,simple_out_flow_key ,simple_out_flow_name ,batch_in_flow_id ,batch_in_flow_key ,batch_in_flow_name ,batch_out_flow_id ,batch_out_flow_key ,batch_out_flow_name ,in_report_restriction ,out_report_restriction ,max_capacity ,lock_flag ,frozen_period_in ,grade_astrict ,industry_code ,industry_exponent ,fund_rate_limit ,open_day_adjust ,outer_sort ,inner_sort ,description ,status ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time ,#{operatorId} ,NOW() ,#{oprtType} FROM ip_investment_pool WHERE id = #{id}

INSERT INTO ip_investment_pool_evt ( id ,parent_id ,pool_code ,pool_name ,pool_type ,pool_level ,market_codes ,variety_codes ,hs_pool_name ,in_flow_id ,in_flow_key ,in_flow_name ,out_flow_id ,out_flow_key ,out_flow_name ,simple_in_flow_id ,simple_in_flow_key ,simple_in_flow_name ,simple_out_flow_id ,simple_out_flow_key ,simple_out_flow_name ,batch_in_flow_id ,batch_in_flow_key ,batch_in_flow_name ,batch_out_flow_id ,batch_out_flow_key ,batch_out_flow_name ,in_report_restriction ,out_report_restriction ,max_capacity ,outer_sort ,inner_sort ,description ,status ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time ,opter_id ,opt_time ,oprt_type ) SELECT id ,parent_id ,pool_code ,pool_name ,pool_type ,pool_level ,market_codes ,variety_codes ,hs_pool_name ,in_flow_id ,in_flow_key ,in_flow_name ,out_flow_id ,out_flow_key ,out_flow_name ,simple_in_flow_id ,simple_in_flow_key ,simple_in_flow_name ,simple_out_flow_id ,simple_out_flow_key ,simple_out_flow_name ,batch_in_flow_id ,batch_in_flow_key ,batch_in_flow_name ,batch_out_flow_id ,batch_out_flow_key ,batch_out_flow_name ,in_report_restriction ,out_report_restriction ,max_capacity ,lock_flag ,frozen_period_in ,grade_astrict ,industry_code ,industry_exponent ,fund_rate_limit ,open_day_adjust ,outer_sort ,inner_sort ,description ,status ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time ,#{operatorId} ,NOW() ,#{oprtType} FROM ip_investment_pool WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE ip_investment_pool SET is_deleted = 1 ,updt_time = NOW() WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id ,pool_id ,relation_type ,relation_pool_id ,relation_pool_name ,sort_order ,remark ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time FROM ip_pool_relation WHERE pool_id = #{poolId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY relation_type ASC ,sort_order ASC ,id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ip_pool_relation_evt ( id ,pool_id ,relation_type ,relation_pool_id ,relation_pool_name ,sort_order ,remark ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time ,opter_id ,opt_time ,oprt_type ) SELECT id ,pool_id ,relation_type ,relation_pool_id ,relation_pool_name ,sort_order ,remark ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time ,#{operatorId} ,NOW() ,#{oprtType} FROM ip_pool_relation WHERE id = #{id}

INSERT INTO ip_pool_relation_evt ( id ,pool_id ,relation_type ,relation_pool_id ,relation_pool_name ,sort_order ,remark ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time ,opter_id ,opt_time ,oprt_type ) SELECT id ,pool_id ,relation_type ,relation_pool_id ,relation_pool_name ,sort_order ,remark ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time ,#{operatorId} ,NOW() ,#{oprtType} FROM ip_pool_relation WHERE pool_id = #{poolId} AND is_deleted = 0

INSERT INTO ip_pool_relation_evt ( id ,pool_id ,relation_type ,relation_pool_id ,relation_pool_name ,sort_order ,remark ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time ,opter_id ,opt_time ,oprt_type ) SELECT id ,pool_id ,relation_type ,relation_pool_id ,relation_pool_name ,sort_order ,remark ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time ,#{operatorId} ,NOW() ,#{oprtType} FROM ip_pool_relation WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND pool_id IN
#{poolId}

INSERT INTO ip_pool_relation_evt ( id ,pool_id ,relation_type ,relation_pool_id ,relation_pool_name ,sort_order ,remark ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time ,opter_id ,opt_time ,oprt_type ) SELECT id ,pool_id ,relation_type ,relation_pool_id ,relation_pool_name ,sort_order ,remark ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time ,#{operatorId} ,NOW() ,#{oprtType} FROM ip_pool_relation WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND relation_pool_id IN
#{relationPoolId}
mapper.update: UPDATE ip_pool_relation SET is_deleted = 1 ,updt_time = NOW() WHERE pool_id = #{poolId} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE ip_pool_relation SET is_deleted = 1 ,updt_time = NOW() WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND pool_id IN
#{poolId}

UPDATE ip_pool_relation SET is_deleted = 1 ,updt_time = NOW() WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND relation_pool_id IN
#{relationPoolId}
mapper.select: SELECT id ,pool_id ,rule_type ,rule_id ,rule_desc ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time FROM ip_pool_auto_rule WHERE pool_id = #{poolId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY rule_type ASC ,id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ip_pool_auto_rule_evt ( id ,pool_id ,rule_type ,rule_id ,rule_desc ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time ,opter_id ,opt_time ,oprt_type ) SELECT id ,pool_id ,rule_type ,rule_id ,rule_desc ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time ,#{operatorId} ,NOW() ,#{oprtType} FROM ip_pool_auto_rule WHERE id = #{id}

INSERT INTO ip_pool_auto_rule_evt ( id ,pool_id ,rule_type ,rule_id ,rule_desc ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time ,opter_id ,opt_time ,oprt_type ) SELECT id ,pool_id ,rule_type ,rule_id ,rule_desc ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time ,#{operatorId} ,NOW() ,#{oprtType} FROM ip_pool_auto_rule WHERE pool_id = #{poolId} AND is_deleted = 0

INSERT INTO ip_pool_auto_rule_evt ( id ,pool_id ,rule_type ,rule_id ,rule_desc ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time ,opter_id ,opt_time ,oprt_type ) SELECT id ,pool_id ,rule_type ,rule_id ,rule_desc ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time ,#{operatorId} ,NOW() ,#{oprtType} FROM ip_pool_auto_rule WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND pool_id IN
#{poolId}
mapper.update: UPDATE ip_pool_auto_rule SET is_deleted = 1 ,updt_time = NOW() WHERE pool_id = #{poolId} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE ip_pool_auto_rule SET is_deleted = 1 ,updt_time = NOW() WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND pool_id IN
#{poolId}
mapper.select: SELECT pool_id ,relation_type ,relation_pool_id ,relation_pool_name FROM ip_pool_relation WHERE relation_type IN ('in_mutex', 'out_mutex') AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY pool_id ASC ,relation_type ASC ,sort_order ASC
SELECT id AS flowId ,flow_key ,name AS flowName FROM wf_flow_definition WHERE status = 'active' AND (is_deleted IS NULL OR is_deleted = 0) ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id ,name ,parent_id ,NULL AS sort_order ,enable ,ts AS crte_time ,ts AS updt_time FROM ais_inv_analysis.t_sys_role WHERE enable = 1 ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT id ,pool_id ,permission_type ,handler_type ,handler_id ,handler_name ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time FROM ip_pool_permission WHERE pool_id = #{poolId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY permission_type ASC ,handler_type ASC ,id ASC

SELECT id ,pool_id ,permission_type ,handler_type ,handler_id ,handler_name ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time FROM ip_pool_permission WHERE permission_type = #{permissionType} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY pool_id ASC ,handler_type ASC ,id ASC
SELECT DISTINCT ur.role_id FROM ais_inv_analysis.t_sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN ais_inv_analysis.t_sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.enable = 1 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ip_pool_permission_evt ( id ,pool_id ,permission_type ,handler_type ,handler_id ,handler_name ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time ,opter_id ,opt_time ,oprt_type ) SELECT id ,pool_id ,permission_type ,handler_type ,handler_id ,handler_name ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time ,#{operatorId} ,NOW() ,#{oprtType} FROM ip_pool_permission WHERE id = #{id}

INSERT INTO ip_pool_permission_evt ( id ,pool_id ,permission_type ,handler_type ,handler_id ,handler_name ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time ,opter_id ,opt_time ,oprt_type ) SELECT id ,pool_id ,permission_type ,handler_type ,handler_id ,handler_name ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time ,#{operatorId} ,NOW() ,#{oprtType} FROM ip_pool_permission WHERE pool_id = #{poolId} AND is_deleted = 0

INSERT INTO ip_pool_permission_evt ( id ,pool_id ,permission_type ,handler_type ,handler_id ,handler_name ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time ,opter_id ,opt_time ,oprt_type ) SELECT id ,pool_id ,permission_type ,handler_type ,handler_id ,handler_name ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time ,#{operatorId} ,NOW() ,#{oprtType} FROM ip_pool_permission WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND pool_id IN
#{poolId}
mapper.update: UPDATE ip_pool_permission SET is_deleted = 1 ,updt_time = NOW() WHERE pool_id = #{poolId} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE ip_pool_permission SET is_deleted = 1 ,updt_time = NOW() WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND pool_id IN
#{poolId}
